mapper.sql: SELECT id, name, file_extension, path, is_directory, node_type, skill_scope, skill_type, learned_from_session, business_system, owner_user, parent_id, sort_order, file_size, mime_type, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, remark FROM skill_node
mapper.select: ORDER BY sort_order ASC, create_time ASC

SELECT id, name, file_extension, path, is_directory, node_type, parent_id, sort_order, skill_scope, skill_type, learned_from_session, business_system, owner_user, content, skill_metadata, file_size, mime_type, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, remark FROM skill_node WHERE id = #{id}

SELECT id, name, file_extension, path, is_directory, node_type, parent_id, sort_order, skill_scope, skill_type, learned_from_session, business_system, owner_user, content, skill_metadata, file_size, mime_type, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, remark FROM skill_node WHERE path = #{path}
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO skill_node
name, file_extension, path, is_directory, node_type, skill_scope, skill_type, learned_from_session, business_system, owner_user, parent_id, sort_order, content, skill_metadata, file_size, mime_type, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, remark,
#{name}, #{fileExtension}, #{path}, #{isDirectory}, #{nodeType}, #{skillScope}, #{skillType}, #{learnedFromSession}, #{businessSystem}, #{ownerUser}, #{parentId}, #{sortOrder}, #{content}, #{skillMetadata}, #{fileSize}, #{mimeType}, #{createBy}, #{createTime}, #{updateBy}, #{updateTime}, #{remark},
mapper.delete:
DELETE FROM skill_node WHERE id IN
#{id}
mapper.select: where node_type = 'skill' and ( (skill_scope = 'global') or (skill_scope = 'personal' and business_system = #{businessSystem} and owner_user = #{userLoginName}) ) order by sort_order asc, create_time desc
where node_type = 'skill' and skill_scope = 'global' order by sort_order asc, create_time desc
where (node_type = 'skill' OR node_type = 'skill_package') and skill_scope = 'personal' and owner_user = #{ownerUser} order by create_time desc
select * from skill_node where skill_scope = 'personal' and owner_user = #{ownerUser} and (business_system = #{businessSystem} or business_system is null) order by create_time desc
mapper.delete: delete from skill_node where skill_scope = 'personal' and create_time < DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL #{days} DAY)
mapper.select: SELECT id, name, file_extension, path, is_directory, node_type, skill_scope, skill_type, learned_from_session, business_system, owner_user, parent_id, sort_order, file_size, mime_type, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, remark, lifecycle_state, pinned FROM skill_node WHERE skill_scope = 'personal' AND (lifecycle_state = 'active' OR lifecycle_state IS NULL) AND pinned = 0 AND DATEDIFF(NOW(), COALESCE(update_time, create_time)) > #{days}
mapper.update: UPDATE skill_node SET lifecycle_state = #{state}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}

UPDATE skill_node SET lifecycle_state = 'archived', update_time = NOW() WHERE skill_scope = 'personal' AND lifecycle_state = 'stale' AND pinned = 0 AND DATEDIFF(NOW(), COALESCE(update_time, create_time)) > #{days}
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM skill_node WHERE skill_scope = 'personal' AND lifecycle_state = 'archived' AND DATEDIFF(NOW(), COALESCE(update_time, create_time)) > #{days}
mapper.select: SELECT id, name, file_extension, path, is_directory, node_type, skill_scope, skill_type, learned_from_session, business_system, owner_user, parent_id, sort_order, content, skill_metadata, file_size, mime_type, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, remark, lifecycle_state, pinned FROM skill_node WHERE id = #{id}

SELECT id, name, file_extension, path, is_directory, node_type, skill_scope, skill_type, learned_from_session, business_system, owner_user, parent_id, sort_order, file_size, mime_type, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, remark FROM skill_node WHERE node_type = 'skill' AND ( (skill_scope = 'global') OR (skill_scope = 'personal' AND business_system = #{businessSystem} AND owner_user = #{userLoginName}) ) AND (name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR content LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')) ORDER BY sort_order ASC, create_time DESC LIMIT 20

SELECT id, name, file_extension, path, is_directory, node_type, skill_scope, skill_type, learned_from_session, business_system, owner_user, parent_id, sort_order, content, skill_metadata, file_size, mime_type, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, remark, lifecycle_state, pinned FROM skill_node WHERE parent_id = #{packageId} AND UPPER(name) = 'SKILL.MD' AND is_directory = 0 LIMIT 1
select count(*) from skill_node where node_type = 'skill_package'
select count(*) from skill_node where node_type = 'skill_package' and create_time <= DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 7 DAY)
